overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through a futuristic cyberpunk city, featuring transitions from open intersections to covered overpasses and dark tunnels. The footage showcases dense urban architecture with towering digital billboards, neon signage, and multi-level highway structures typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with digital advertising towers

events.description: turning left at the intersection to enter covered roadway
entering shaded area beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection and turning left to enter the covered urban highway

notable_agents.action: delivery truck moving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing product images on building facade
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall reflective building with multiple floors and glass panels
heavy steel framework of elevated highway with support beams

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit futuristic intersection with large digital billboards and glass towers. The vehicle turns left and begins entering a covered roadway beneath an elevated highway structure, transitioning from open sky to partial cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway beneath Cartwright overpass with traffic control

events.description: slowing down behind delivery trucks as traffic congests
resuming forward motion as traffic light changes and vehicles ahead move

agents.ego_description: crawling through moderate traffic under the overpass, following delivery trucks and stopping at traffic signals

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck with brake lights illuminated, moving slowly ahead
silver sedan driving in the left adjacent lane

entered.detail: illuminated green street sign suspended from overpass truss structure
enclosed walkway with green tinted glass connecting buildings
exterior escalator with green trim connecting street levels

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath the Cartwright overpass structure, the scene features heavy steel trusses overhead and moderate traffic flow. The vehicle stops behind delivery trucks before proceeding past an exterior escalator and elevated pedestrian walkway on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit covered commercial street with dense digital signage

events.description: transitioning to darker artificial lighting dominated by neon signs and digital screens
passing under massive curved digital billboard structure

agents.ego_description: cruising through the covered street lined with vertical neon signs and large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk near the neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with Japanese characters and bright red lighting
illuminated hotel sign with blue and pink neon lighting
massive curved digital display showing advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a darker, enclosed urban canyon illuminated by vibrant neon signs and massive digital billboards. The vehicle drives past vertical Japanese neon signage and hotel advertisements while pedestrians walk along the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete service tunnel with red emergency lighting

events.description: entering dark concrete tunnel with red emergency wall lights and visible exit at far end

agents.ego_description: entering and accelerating through the dark tunnel toward the bright light at the far end

entered.detail: dark opening with rough concrete walls and overhead industrial pipes
wall-mounted red lights casting ambient glow on tunnel interior
rough unfinished concrete walls with graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dark concrete service tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights. The vehicle drives through the narrow enclosed space toward a bright light visible at the tunnel's end, leaving the neon-lit city behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a sunlit urban intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a dark service tunnel. It begins at a bright crossing surrounded by glass towers and digital billboards before the vehicle turns left, moving from the open sky into the partial cover of an elevated highway. As the camera proceeds beneath the heavy steel trusses of the Cartwright overpass, it passes delivery trucks and pedestrian walkways before the environment shifts into a dark, enclosed urban canyon saturated with vibrant neon signs and Japanese advertisements. The scene then narrows further as the vehicle leaves the neon-lit streets behind, finally entering a concrete service tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights and driving toward a bright light at the far end.
